login.title: Log in
login.subtitle: Welcome back! Enter your details to access your account

validation.passwordLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.

phoneVerify.title: A verification code was sent to your phone

callback.title: Completing sign-in
callback.loading: You will be redirected automatically after verification.
callback.missingSession: The Google sign-in session was not received. Try signing in again.

reset.title: Forgot password?
reset.emailHelp: Enter your email and we will send a password reset link
reset.phoneHelp: Enter your phone number and we will send a verification code
reset.emailSent: We sent a password reset link to
reset.openEmailLink: Open the link in the email to enter a new password.
reset.newPasswordHelp: Choose a strong password to protect your account
reset.doneMessage: Your password was changed successfully. Redirecting to login...

validation.passwordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
validation.passwordLetters: Password must contain uppercase and lowercase English letters.
validation.passwordNumber: Password must contain at least one number.
validation.passwordSymbol: Password must contain a special character such as @ or #.
validation.invalidRecovery: The reset link or code is invalid. Start the request again.

signup.changeLater: You can change these details later in settings
signup.personalDescription: Organize appointments, share trips, and join events.
signup.organizationDescription: Publish events and help everyone arrive on time.
signup.createSubtitle: Start your PlanGo journey in minutes
signup.usernameHelp: Friends and followers will see it as @username
signup.usernameRules: Letters and numbers only, 4 to 30 characters
signup.profileLinkHelp: Your final profile link will look like
signup.personalProfileHelp: Add a short bio and choose the right privacy level
signup.privateHelp: Only approved followers can see your activity
signup.organizationPublicHelp: Organization accounts are always public so people can follow their events.
signup.afterCreate: After creating the account, your basic details will be saved and a verification email will be sent.

validation.passwordInvalid: Use at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, a number, and a special character.
validation.passwordsMismatch: The password confirmation does not match.
validation.usernameInvalid: Username must contain 4 to 30 letters or numbers.

create.title: Create your account
create.description: Sign up in minutes and set your city and travel preferences.

appointments.title: Add appointments
appointments.description: Add appointments manually or connect Google Calendar.

alerts.title: Receive alerts
alerts.description: PlanGo recommends the best departure time using traffic, weather, and route data.

arrive.title: Arrive on time
arrive.description: Move through your day with more confidence and less stress.

punctuality.label: Better punctuality
punctuality.description: Average improvement in arrival accuracy after one month.

stress.label: Less daily stress
stress.description: Users who said their day became calmer.

free.question: Is PlanGo really free?
free.answer: Yes. The free plan will remain available, and you can upgrade when needed.

departure.question: How does PlanGo calculate departure time?
departure.answer: It uses live traffic and weather along with your transport and arrival preferences.

language.question: Does the app support Arabic and English?
language.answer: Yes. The entire experience supports both languages with RTL, LTR, and optimized fonts.

calendar.question: Can it connect to Google Calendar?
calendar.answer: Yes. Two-way synchronization is available and can be customized in settings.

team.basma: Ensures frontend quality and a smooth user journey.

team.areej: Develops backend services and improves platform reliability.
team.maram: Manages data services and integration performance.
